hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const cmd=d.command||'';if(cmd.includes('npm run build')||cmd.includes('next build')){const r=require('child_process').spawnSync('npm',['run','lint'],{encoding:'utf8'});if(r.status!==0){process.stderr.write('Lint errors — fix before building:\n'+(r.stdout||r.stderr||''));process.exit(1)}}"
